150 P3A P3A_NR_MOTION_PASS 39a(P3a)Nursing Rehab: Range of Motion (Passive) CHAR 1 Indicates the extent to which the patient received passive range of motion nursing rehabilitation intervention. Range of motion exercise is a program of passive movements to maintain flexibility and useful motion in the joints of the body. The caregive moves the body part around a fixed point or joint through the patient's available range of motion.
151 P3B P3B_NR_MOTION_ACTV
